name: Video to PDF – Receive callback (PDF when done)

nodes.name: Webhook (callback)
nodes.notes: FastAPI POSTs here when the pipeline finishes. Body: JSON with job_id, status, error, pdf_transcript_base64, pdf_explanation_base64 (when done).

nodes.name: Normalize payload
nodes.notes: Outputs job_id, status, error, pdf_transcript_base64, pdf_explanation_base64 (when done).

nodes.name: Decode PDF to binary
nodes.notes: Outputs binary 'transcript' (lecture_transcript.pdf) and 'explanation' (lecture_explanation.pdf). Use in Drive, Email, etc.

nodes.name: Respond 200 OK
nodes.notes: Respond 200 so FastAPI does not retry. When status=done, item has binary.transcript and binary.explanation (both PDFs).
